productDisplayName: Puma Men Speed Grapic tee Blue Tshirt
description: Composition Blue round neck T-shirt made of 100% polyester, has short sleeves, mesh panels on the sides, light blue tipping from the neck to the cuffs of the sleeves, rubber print on the front, graphic print on both sleeves Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash cold with like colours Do not bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Cool iron; Do not iron on decorations Adopt a winning attitude with this blue T-shirt from puma. The stylish graphic print gives this tee a stunning look and the soft polyester fabric gives you exemplary comfort all day long. Pair this with a pair of track pants and running shoes. Model statistics Model is a size M of height 6', chest 39" and shoulders 18”
